chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) A manufactured house or house trailer may not be towed in excess of the posted speed limit or 55 miles per hour, whichever is less.

(b) In this section, “house trailer” has the meaning assigned by Section 541.201 (Vehicles) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.101 — Speed Limit

(a) A manufactured house or house trailer may not be towed in excess of the posted speed limit or 55 miles per hour, whichever is less.

(b) In this section, “house trailer” has the meaning assigned by Section 541.201 (Vehicles) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1020, Sec. 4, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A manufactured house or house trailer may not be towed in excess of the posted speed limit or 55 miles per hour, whichever is less.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: In this section, “house trailer” has the meaning assigned by Section 541.201 (Vehicles) .
